entries.definition:
kh–r–d–l mustard seeds; a large chunk of meat, to cut into
small pieces; (of a palm tree) to shed its fruits before they are
ripe. Of this root, خَرْدَل khardal occurs twice in the Qur’an.

خَرْدَل khardal [coll. n.] mustard seed (21:47) وَإِن كَانَ مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِّنْ
خَرْدَلٍ and if there be even the weight of a mustard seed, We
will produce it.
